Constructor Detail

PercentageTimer

public PercentageTimer(int totalTime,
                       int numSteps,
                       ActionListener listener)
Create a PercentageTimer that will notify its listeners numSteps times over the course of approximately totalTime milliseconds. Each listener will receive an ActionEvent with the completed percentage stored in getActionCommand() in floating point notation.

Parameters:
totalTime - in milliseconds
numSteps -
listener -
